get.description: Returns a paginated list of appointments for the authenticated client, ordered by date descending.

post.description: Books a new appointment for the authenticated client.

patch.description: Allows the authenticated client to cancel their own appointment.

422.description: Cannot cancel appointment in current status

get.description: Returns the full status change history for a specific appointment. Accessible by the appointment owner, assigned worker, or admin.
Returns all possible appointment statuses for dropdowns and filters.
Returns a paginated list of all appointments. Accessible by admin and worker roles.

422.description: Cannot decline appointment in current status
Cannot confirm appointment in current status

patch.description: Used by staff to start the appointment and mark it as in_progress.

422.description: Cannot complete appointment in current status
Cannot mark as no-show in current status

message.example: Please check your email for a confirmation link.
The email has already been taken.

get.description: Verifies user email using the link sent to their inbox

post.description: Revokes the current access token and logs out the authenticated user

get.description: Returns free time slots for a given worker, service and date.

worker_id: The selected worker id is invalid.
service_id: The selected service id is invalid.
date: You can only book up to 6 months in advance

get.description: Returns a list of all categories. Publicly accessible.
Returns a list of all active services with their categories. Publicly accessible.

post.summary: Sync services assigned to a user
